title: Health Policy Analyst
description: Dana-Farber is a world-leading cancer research and treatment center affiliated with Harvard Medical School. You'll analyze health policy issues impacting cancer care and research.
responsibilities: Analyze healthcare policy impact on organizational operations and research
Monitor legislative changes in oncology and cancer care regulation
Develop policy position statements and advocacy materials
Present policy analyses to leadership and board committees
Build relationships with policy stakeholders and advocacy organizations
Support grant applications and policy-focused research initiatives

requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Health, Policy, Health Administration, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 3-5 years of health policy research or analysis experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
